info.name: Fork Black Hole onemore 228
info.description:
Merging thin and thick disks, blackholes with accretion disks of different morphologies can now be transformed through parameters.
GLSL files can be found at https://github.com/baopinshui/NPGS/blob/master/NPGS/Sources/Engine/Shaders/BlackHole.frag.glsl
